历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest science rankings were approximately 33618 → 40832 → 57633 → 33718 → 41804, with drastic fluctuations in the past five years. In 2023, due to a gap, the ranking significantly dropped to 57633, quickly rebounded to 33718 in 2024, and fell back to 41804 in 2025. The baseline ranking in the last two years is about 41800, showing a wide oscillation pattern. The university's science enrollment plan in Shaanxi was 69 in 2021, 80 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 81 in 2024, and 83 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion each year. The 2026 plan is 83, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion buffer effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Inner Mongolia University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science China University ranking has been around 114-120 in recent years, rising to 114th in 2026, showing a stable upward trend, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 101st, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 105,000, and short video exposure is at the lower-middle level among 211 universities. No obvious admission gaps or cold records have been found. The university is known for biology (Double First-Class discipline), ecology, ethnology, Chinese language and literature, etc., but specific ratings cannot be confirmed.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,500 in 2025, significantly increasing competitive pressure. Social popularity for engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information, and electrical engineering remains high, strongly attracting science candidates. Inner Mongolia University is located in Hohhot, relatively close to Shaanxi, making it a neighboring province university with some regional appeal to Shaanxi candidates. The number of students enrolled in Shaanxi accounts for a relatively small proportion of its total national plan, with cross-provincial enrollment scale remaining relatively stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 41804, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 19.7% in Shaanxi physics category candidates, and the university's average reputation and popularity, competition is expected to intensify in 2026, with rankings likely to shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 43304, with a range of 42804-43804.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 42000), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like computer science and electronic information. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (above 43800), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 safety majors to secure admission to this university.
